Container.Name: Digarr
Container.Overview:
AI-powered music discovery engine for self-hosted music stacks. Connects to Lidarr, Last.fm, ListenBrainz, Spotify, and more to find new artists you will actually like. Supports auto-playlists, subscription feeds, mood-based discovery, and genre browsing.
REQUIRES a PostgreSQL database. Point DATABASE_URL at your existing postgres instance, or install a postgres container first.

Config.Name: Initial Username
Config.Description: Auto-create this admin user on first boot

Config.Name: Initial Password
Config.Description: Password for the initial admin user (min 8 chars)

Config.Name: AI Provider
Config.Description: AI provider: anthropic, openai, gemini, ollama, openai-compatible (or configure in UI)

Config.Name: AI API Key
Config.Description: API key for the AI provider

Config.Name: AI Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL for openai-compatible or ollama (e.g. http://ollama:11434)

Config.Name: Lidarr URL
Config.Description: Lidarr instance URL, e.g. http://lidarr:8686 (optional -- discovery works without Lidarr)

Config.Name: Lidarr API Key
Config.Description: Lidarr API key (Settings > General in Lidarr)

Config.Name: Allowed Origin
Config.Description: CORS allowed origin, e.g. https://digarr.example.com (required for reverse proxy)

Config.Name: Encryption Key
Config.Description: 32+ char key for encrypting stored API tokens (auto-generated if blank)

Config.Name: Disable Registration
Config.Description: Set to false to allow new user registration

Config.Name: Skip TLS Verify
Config.Description: Skip TLS certificate verification for Lidarr/Jellyfin connections

Config.Name: Webhook URL
Config.Description: Discord, Slack, ntfy, or any HTTP endpoint for notifications
